data.html:
Input ：Graph G(V，E)；input features {x，v∈V}；depth K；weight matrices Wk，Vk∈{1，...，K}；non-linearity σ；differentiable aggregator functions AGGREGATEk，Vk∈{1，...，K}；neighborhood function N：v→2 Output ：Vector representations z for all v∈V
h←x，∀v∈V；
for k=1...K do
for v∈V do
h←AGGREGATEk({h，u∈N(v)})；
h←σ(W CONCAT(h，h))
end
h←h/∥h∥，∀v∈V
end
z←h，∀v∈V

data.caption: Table 1: Prediction results for the three datasets (micro-averaged F1 scores). Results for unsupervised and fully supervised GraphSAGE are shown. Analogous trends hold for macro-averaged scores.

Algorithm 2.GraphSAGE mini-batch forward propagation algorithm
Input ：Graph G(V，E)；input features {x，vEB}；depth K；weight matrices W，，Vk∈{1,...，K}；non-linearity σ；differentiable aggregator functions AGGREGATE，，Vk∈{1,...，K}neighborhood sampling functions，N：v→2V，Vk∈{1,...，K}
Output ：Vector representations z for all vEB
BK-B；for k-K...1doBk-1-Bk；for uEBk doBk-1-Bk-1UN(u)；end
h0-x，vEB0；for k-1...Kdofor uEBk dohAGGREGATEk({hk-1，u'∈N(u)})；hσ(Wk·CONCAT(hk-1，hN(u))）；hku/hk；end
